_comment: FlexMatch Rule Set for Tank Battle Royale — 4 players, latency-based matching
_note: This file is for reference/documentation only. The actual rule set is embedded in gamelift-stack.ts (CfnMatchmakingRuleSet). Keep this in sync.
name: TankBattleRoyale-RuleSet

playerAttributes.name: latencyInMs
playerAttributes._comment: Special attribute type for latency maps. Unity sends { 'us-east-1': 45, 'eu-west-1': 120 }

teams.name: players
teams._comment: Single team, free-for-all. All 4 players are on the same 'team' in the data model, but fight each other in-game.

rules.name: FastConnection
rules.description: Require all players to have low latency to the game server location
rules._comment: 200ms is comfortable for a turn-based-ish tank game. Expanded below after 30s.

expansions._comment: After 30 seconds of searching, relax latency to 500ms to avoid long waits
After 60 seconds, accept any latency — ensure players always find a match
